item.title: Feeling of the day: gods fucking dammit
item.description: So, i am sitting at home, bc one of my employers thought it pruedent to not employ me anymore. I am working in special ed. Seems like the bottom line is more im portant than he care for the kids. I am in the employ of three different institutions, doing similar work with the same kids. - That's just how it needs to be done. But today, i was given notice, that my work is no longer needed, bc i am too expensive. just a small FYI: I am payed through a statefunded educational fund. I have seen - and been told by now former colleagues - my replacement. they are two young, barely adult ppl, being paid through a differnet institution. they are by all metrics way less qualified than me. and i can not get rid of the feeling, that this is somehow related to my salary. This part of my job was never the most demanding, but i loved it, and the kids did, too. Now it becomes even more of a kids herding operation.
item.dc:creator: JackHL01

item.title: I absolutely despise liars.
item.description: Source: https://old.reddit.com/r/PoliticalHumor/comments/1ftjgjo/florida_man_asking_for_florida_things/ Fox puppets laying out how to steal an election before actively commanding it: https://imgur.com/gallery/sQzDOlI Pardons for criminals, by criminals: https://www.justice.gov/pardon/pardons-granted-president-donald-j-trump-2017-2021 Brought to you by: "The best people" https://imgur.com/gallery/5k3JHlE https://imgur.com/gallery/9zDDKFT (continued) https://imgur.com/gallery/LPyUdYF (continued) https://imgur.com/gallery/7wxyNys (continued) https://imgur.com/gallery/taJZoC7 (continued) https://imgur.com/gallery/VdkqbFS (continued) https://imgur.com/gallery/YlAGDFN (continued) https://imgur.com/gallery/8GHlxoG (continued) https://imgur.com/gallery/8VGDY8w (continued) https://imgur.com/gallery/hYduSMS (continued) https://imgur.com/gallery/3uhtTUq (continued) https://imgur.com/gallery/JJzITny (continued) FULL LIST: https://www.dailykos.com/history/user/CajsaLilliehook Don't forget Gweggy! https://imgur.com/gallery/ddZqpFD More from Texas: https://imgur.com/gallery/NNRExX2 Also in Texas: https://imgur.com/gallery/prqm2cq Also in Texas (update provided by: UnknownParticipant67): https://www.chron.com/neighborhood/moco/news/article/texas-right-to-life-luke-bowen-prison-solicit-teen-17788511.php That's a lot of lawsuits! https://www.azcentral.com/pages/interactives/trump-lawsuits/ Indictment 3: https://imgur.com/gallery/JQ99Kxu Follow the progress of indictment 3 against the terrorist! https://www.courtlistener.com/docket/67656604/united-states-v-trump/ Indictment 4: https://imgur.com/gallery/Kq3qYbO

item.title: I Stole This Dump So You Don't Have To. Tuesday Random Meme Dump Of Pure Chaos
item.description:
1. So here all the sand in the world!
2. Female mating dance caught on camera in the wild
3. Thank me later!
4. Me: 'I'm not scared of anyone!' Also me when I see her: 'Uh... let's talk this out?
5. Am I too late with the Barbenhaimer memes
6. My heart is broken for these poor victims
7. Stand your ground!
8. The anxiety build is insane!
9. Go to a haunted house, it will be fun....
10. Sharks when they finally evolve to walk on land
11. Just dog hat, very fashionable in Europe, I hear
12. I'm not sure what the point of this video was, but I like pretty Batman lady
13. HEYYY! I needed that!
14. Yes, I'm here for the Lumber Facts and nothing else
15. Here is a blooper from the game I'm currently working. If you have the time please help out with wishlist on Steam because it's the only game that almost had a Hitler Toaster in it (yeah, I know, bad idea). But don’t worry, there’s still plenty of absurdity left! Your wishlist is toast-ally going to make my day: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse/
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames

item.title: Political Memes for Our We Really Need to Vote Times
item.description: CONTENT CONTROLS “Content Controls will allow you to see fewer posts from certain topics or tags while you browse Imgur.” https://help.imgur.com/hc/en-us/articles/26509094934171-Content-Controls “I tried to push him, he kept coming back” — Natasha shares her account of being assaulted by Trump. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=yFlTJjR2JC4 USA: How to register to vote: https://www.usa.gov/register-to-vote USA: Check to see if you are registered to vote: https://vote.gov/ Voter Registration deadlines are here: https://www.vote.org/voter-registration-deadlines/ Ohio Voters: Check Your Registration: https://voterlookup.ohiosos.gov/voterlookup.aspx Vote BLUE the whole ballot through. Remember to: • Confirm your state’s requirements & voting dates/times -- early voting is often easier than Election Day • Recheck registration before your registration deadline “Harris’ Plan To Raise the Minimum Wage and Eliminate Tax on Tips Would Benefit Service and Hospitality Workers “Crucially, the vice president’s proposal would provide guardrails to keep the policy aimed at low-paid workers, in contrast to Trump’s plan, which would allow the wealthy to skirt taxes.” https://www.americanprogressaction.org/article/harris-plan-to-raise-the-minimum-wage-and-eliminate-tax-on-tips-would-benefit-service-and-hospitality-workers/ Download Project 2025: https://www.documentcloud.org/documents/24088042-project-2025s-mandate-for-leadership-the-conservative-promise Andrew Tobias: Almost Daily Progressive Comments and Links https://andrewtobias.com/

item.title: John Amos Dies: ‘Good Times’, ‘Roots’ Actor Was 84
item.description: John Amos, the actor whose characters in Good Times, Roots and The Mary Tyler Moore Show lent the 1970s a solid share of its too-few portrayals of strong Black male role models, died August 21 in Los Angeles of natural causes. He was 84. His death, announced by son Kelly Christopher Amos, had not been disclosed until today. “It is with heartfelt sadness that I share with you that my father has transitioned,” Kelly Christopher Amos said in a statement. “He was a man with the kindest heart and a heart of gold… and he was loved the world over. Many fans consider him their TV father. He lived a good life. His legacy will live on in his outstanding works in television and film as an actor
item.dc:creator: meatballdreamer
Lassannn
